levels.purpose: Global routing into projects, tools and downloads.
Support pages that must link up to the parent page and sideways to relevant tools/downloads.

priority_rules: Every project deep-dive must be within 2 clicks of the homepage.
Every question page must link to its parent project and at least one tool/download.
Every download landing page must show a real preview and link to a project/tool route.
No page should be an orphan; validation should catch zero incoming or zero outgoing contextual links.
